title: Mana Influx
tagline: Progression fantasy forged by a world-shattering surge of mana.
description: The Mana Influx transformed Earth overnight, turning cities into dungeons and survivors into class-bearing adventurers. Bronwic, a retired logistics specialist with a penchant for storytelling, becomes an unlikely hero when he embraces the system and harnesses the mana storms. The series blends crunchy LitRPG mechanics, heartfelt camaraderie, and high-octane battles across an evolving post-apocalyptic landscape.
highlights: Post-apocalyptic LitRPG progression with meaningful character arcs.
Crunchy system sheets, unique mana evolutions, and creative builds.
Found family energy centered on Bronwic’s irreverent storytelling.

cta.label: Start with Tall Tales of Bronwic
